question_text:
Integer to English Words

Convert a non-negative integer to its English words representation.
explanation: Iteratively process chunks of three digits (billions, millions, thousands) and recursively build their word equivalents.

test_cases.expected_output: "One Million Two Hundred Thirty Four Thousand Five Hundred Sixty Seven"
"Two Billion One Hundred Forty Seven Million Four Hundred Eighty Three Thousand Six Hundred Forty Seven"
"Nine Hundred Ninety Nine Million Nine Hundred Ninety Nine Thousand Nine Hundred Ninety Nine"
